description: Letter from Yehuda (b. Ṭuviyyahu) Kohen, in Jūjar, to Rabbenu [Menaḥem?], presumably in Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: late 12th or early 13th century. Written in haste. The sender reports that he arrived in Jūjar at midday and found the messenger about to depart. He asks the addressee to send(?) his son to attend the mitzva(?). ASE.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Jūjar. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
